CLAUSE.NAME: Tag 78 Mixed Pay ANY
CLAUSE.value: + UPON RECEIPT OF YOUR AUTHENTICATED MESSAGE CONFIRMING THAT DOCUMENTS HAVE BEEN PRESENTED AT YOUR COUNTERS IN STRICT ACCORDANCE WITH L/C TERMS AND CONDITIONS, WE SHALL (A)REIMBURSE YOU, VALUE THREE WORKING DAYS FROM DATE OF SAID MESSAGE, FOR XX PERCENT OF THE INVOICE VALUE (B)UNDERTAKE TO REIMBURSE YOU ON THE RESPECTIVE MATURITY DATE(S) WITH THE REMAINING XX PERCENT OF THE INVOICE VALUE
